steps.title: Compare the two expansions
steps.content: The sentence sets up a comparison: both Antarctic plant species likely benefited from warming, but Colobanthus quitensis did something distinctive. The table shows it increased by 55%, more than half and more than Deschampsia antarctica.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: A falsely says Deschampsia antarctica covered less land in 2018. C discusses individual plant size, which is not the table's measure. D misuses the percentages as rates of newly freed land coverage. The answer is B.
